title: Acoramidis: MedlinePlus Drug Information
text:

Ask your pharmacist or doctor for a copy of the manufacturer's information for the patient.
Other uses for this medicine 
This medication may be prescribed for other uses; ask your doctor or pharmacist for more information.
What special precautions should I follow? 
Before taking acoramidis, tell your doctor and pharmacist if you are allergic to acoramidis, any other medications, or any of the ingredients in acoramidis tablets. Ask your pharmacist for a list of the ingredients. tell your doctor and pharmacist what prescription and nonprescription medications, vitamins, nutritional supplements, and herbal products you are taking or plan to take while taking acoramidis. Your doctor may need to change the doses of your medications or monitor you carefully for side effects. the following nonprescription or herbal products may interact with acoramidis: St. John's Wort. Be sure to let your doctor and pharmacist know that you are taking this medication before you start taking acoramidis. Do not start any of this medication while taking acoramidis without discussing with your healthcare provider. tell your doctor if you have or have ever had kidney problems. tell your doctor if you are pregnant, plan to become pregnant, or are breast-feeding. If you become pregnant while taking acoramidis, call your doctor. What special dietary instructions should I
